_schema_doc.name: human-readable name (EN)
_schema_doc.type: one of: pattern_setup, indicator_rule, structural_bias, macro_correlation, derivatives_signal, onchain_signal, cycle_time, event_reaction, risk_rule, regime_classifier
_schema_doc.description: concrete plain-English description of what this capability detects

detection.rule_spec: if type=rule|hybrid, Python expression operating on features dict
detection.llm_prompt: if type=llm|hybrid, prompt template passed to codex with chart image

output_when_triggered.level_extraction: how to derive entry/stop/target if any

_schema_doc.typical_users: common trader archetypes that use this — auto-populated during extraction
_schema_doc.evidence_pattern: regex to search trader's tweets for evidence of usage

capabilities.name: Falling Wedge Breakout
capabilities.description: Converging downward trendlines with price breaking above the upper bound, typically at end of pullback. Target = wedge height projected upward.
capabilities.description_zh: 两条下降趋势线收敛，价格向上突破上沿，一般在回调末期出现。目标 = 楔形高度向上投射。

detection.llm_prompt: Look at the chart. Is there a clear falling wedge pattern (two converging downward trendlines)? Has price broken above the upper trendline? Return {present: bool, breakout_confirmed: bool, wedge_height_pct, notes}

output_when_triggered.level_extraction: entry = breakout candle close, stop = wedge low, target = entry + wedge_height

capabilities.evidence_pattern: (?i)falling wedge|下降楔形|楔形.*(突破|上破)

capabilities.name: Rising Wedge Breakdown
capabilities.description: Converging upward trendlines with price breaking below the lower bound. Bearish reversal pattern after uptrend.
capabilities.description_zh: 两条上升趋势线收敛，价格下破下沿。上升段末期看跌反转。

detection.llm_prompt: Is there a rising wedge with price breaking down? {present, breakdown_confirmed, wedge_height_pct}

output_when_triggered.level_extraction: entry = breakdown, stop = wedge high, target = entry - wedge_height

capabilities.name: Bull Flag Continuation
capabilities.description: Sharp up move (flagpole) followed by a downward-sloping parallel channel (flag). Breakout above flag continues trend.
capabilities.description_zh: 快速上涨（旗杆）后形成向下平行通道（旗面），向上突破继续原趋势。

output_when_triggered.level_extraction: target = flagpole height projected from breakout

capabilities.name: Bear Flag Continuation
capabilities.description: Sharp drop followed by upward-sloping parallel channel, then breakdown continues the move.
capabilities.description_zh: 快速下跌后形成向上平行通道，下破继续原趋势。

capabilities.name: Head and Shoulders Top
capabilities.description: Three peaks with middle higher than sides, neckline break = bearish reversal target = head-neckline distance projected down.
capabilities.description_zh: 三峰结构，中峰最高，跌破颈线 = 看跌反转，目标 = 头到颈线距离向下投射。

detection.llm_prompt: H&S top pattern with neckline break? Return head_price, neckline, target_price.

capabilities.name: Inverse Head and Shoulders
capabilities.description: Three troughs with middle lowest, neckline break upward = bullish reversal.
capabilities.description_zh: 三谷结构，中谷最低，上破颈线 = 看多反转。

capabilities.name: Double Top
capabilities.description: Two roughly equal peaks with pullback in between, support break confirms bearish reversal.
capabilities.description_zh: 两个相近高点，中间回调，跌破支撑确认看跌反转。

capabilities.name: Double Bottom
capabilities.description: Two roughly equal troughs with bounce in between, resistance break confirms bullish reversal.
capabilities.description_zh: 两个相近低点，中间反弹，上破阻力确认看多反转。

capabilities.name: Cup and Handle
capabilities.description: U-shaped rounded bottom followed by a small consolidation (handle), then breakout upward.
capabilities.description_zh: U 形圆底后接小幅整理（柄），然后向上突破。

output_when_triggered.level_extraction: target = cup depth projected from handle breakout

capabilities.name: Ascending Triangle Breakout
capabilities.description: Horizontal resistance with rising lows, eventually breaks upward continuing trend.
capabilities.description_zh: 水平阻力 + 抬升低点，最终向上突破延续趋势。

output_when_triggered.level_extraction: target = triangle height projected from breakout

capabilities.name: Descending Triangle Breakdown
capabilities.description: Horizontal support with falling highs, eventually breaks downward.
capabilities.description_zh: 水平支撑 + 下降高点，最终向下跌破。

output_when_triggered.level_extraction: target = triangle height projected from breakdown

capabilities.name: Swing Failure Pattern (SFP)
capabilities.description: Price wicks above prior high (or below prior low) then immediately reverses, trapping breakout traders. Often at range extremes.
capabilities.description_zh: 价格刺破前高（或前低）后立刻反转，困住追突破的人。常见于区间极值。

detection.llm_prompt: SFP above/below prior swing? {direction, sweep_level, reversal_confirmed}

output_when_triggered.level_extraction: entry = reversal candle close, stop = wick extreme

capabilities.name: Range High/Low Fade
capabilities.description: Established horizontal range — short near top, long near bottom without breakout confirmation.
capabilities.description_zh: 清晰横向区间内 — 靠近顶部空，靠近底部多，无突破确认。

output_when_triggered.level_extraction: target = middle of range, stop = just beyond range boundary

capabilities.name: Trend Pullback to MA Continuation
capabilities.description: In clear trend, price pulls back to key MA (20/50/200) and bounces, resuming trend.
capabilities.description_zh: 明确趋势中，价格回踩关键均线（20/50/200）反弹，延续原趋势。

detection.llm_prompt: Price pulling back to which MA?

output_when_triggered.level_extraction: entry = MA touch, stop = below MA

capabilities.name: RSI Bullish Divergence
capabilities.description: Price makes lower low but RSI makes higher low. Signals exhaustion of downtrend.
capabilities.description_zh: 价格创新低但 RSI 不创新低，下跌动能衰竭。

output_when_triggered.level_extraction: entry on reversal candle, stop = recent low

capabilities.name: RSI Bearish Divergence
capabilities.description: Price makes higher high but RSI makes lower high.
capabilities.description_zh: 价格创新高但 RSI 不创新高。
capabilities.evidence_pattern: (?i)bearish divergence|空头背离|看空背离|顶背离

capabilities.name: RSI Oversold Bounce (<30)
capabilities.description: RSI drops below 30 and crosses back up, signaling short-term oversold bounce.
capabilities.description_zh: RSI 跌破 30 后反弹上穿，短线超卖反弹信号。

capabilities.name: Golden Cross (50/200 MA)
capabilities.description: 50-period MA crosses above 200-period MA, long-term bullish signal.
capabilities.description_zh: 50 均线上穿 200 均线，长线看多。

capabilities.name: Death Cross (50/200 MA)
capabilities.description: 50 MA crosses below 200 MA, long-term bearish signal.
capabilities.description_zh: 50 均线下穿 200 均线，长线看空。

capabilities.name: MACD Histogram Zero Cross
capabilities.description: MACD histogram crosses above/below zero, trend change confirmation.
capabilities.description_zh: MACD 柱状上穿 / 下穿零轴，趋势切换确认。

capabilities.name: Bollinger Band Squeeze Breakout
capabilities.description: BBands narrow (low volatility), then breakout with expanded bandwidth.
capabilities.description_zh: 布林带收窄（低波动），然后伴随带宽扩张的突破。

capabilities.name: Fib 0.618 Retracement Support
capabilities.description: Price retraces to 0.618 Fib level of prior impulse, finds support, resumes trend.
capabilities.description_zh: 价格回撤至前一推动段 0.618 位找到支撑，延续趋势。

capabilities.name: Elliott Wave 3 Impulse
capabilities.description: Trader identifies wave 3 of impulse — typically strongest and longest wave in 5-wave sequence.
capabilities.description_zh: 识别 5 浪结构中最强的主升浪 3。

detection.llm_prompt: Elliott wave count visible? Which wave are we in?

capabilities.name: Wyckoff Accumulation Spring
capabilities.description: At range bottom, sharp wick-down sweep followed by reclaim of range (Spring). Signals smart money accumulation.
capabilities.description_zh: 区间底部出现假跌破再收回，聪明钱吸筹信号。

capabilities.name: Wyckoff Distribution Upthrust
capabilities.description: At range top, wick-up sweep followed by rejection back into range. Smart money distributing.
capabilities.description_zh: 区间顶部假突破后被打回，聪明钱派发。

capabilities.name: SMC Order Block Retest
capabilities.description: Institutional order block (last candle before breakout) acts as S/R on retest.
capabilities.description_zh: 订单块（突破前最后一根反向 K）作为回测支撑/阻力。

capabilities.name: DXY/BTC Inverse Correlation
capabilities.description: When DXY breaks down, BTC tends to rally, and vice versa. Used as macro confirmation.
capabilities.description_zh: DXY 跌破 → BTC 倾向上涨，反之亦然。宏观确认。

capabilities.name: SPX Risk-On/Off Regime
capabilities.description: SPX trend signals risk-on (BTC up) or risk-off (BTC down) environment.
capabilities.description_zh: SPX 趋势指示风险偏好模式，BTC 跟随。

capabilities.name: Yields Down → Liquidity Up
capabilities.name_zh: 降息降收益率 → 流动性改善
capabilities.description: US 2Y/10Y yields falling signals easier policy ahead → risk asset bullish.
capabilities.description_zh: 美债收益率下行 = 政策宽松预期 → 风险资产看多。

capabilities.name: Gold as Safe-Haven Proxy
capabilities.description: When gold rallies hard on geopolitical fear, BTC sometimes decouples from risk assets and joins gold.
capabilities.description_zh: 地缘恐慌黄金大涨时 BTC 可能脱离风险资产跟黄金。

capabilities.name: Funding Extreme Negative Squeeze
capabilities.description: Funding rate deeply negative for 2+ days — shorts crowded, potential short squeeze long.
capabilities.description_zh: 资金费率连续 2 天深度负值 = 空单拥挤，轧空概率大。

capabilities.name: Funding Extreme Positive Flush
capabilities.description: Funding rate deeply positive — longs crowded, potential long liquidation flush.
capabilities.description_zh: 资金费率深度正值 = 多单拥挤，长爆概率大。

capabilities.name: OI Climbing, Price Flat
capabilities.name_zh: 持仓上升 价格横盘
capabilities.description: Open interest increasing while price ranges — pressure building, breakout imminent.
capabilities.description_zh: 价格横盘但持仓量上升 —— 压力累积，即将突破。

capabilities.name: Liquidation Cluster Magnet
capabilities.description: Heatmap shows clustered stops above/below; price tends to sweep that level before reversing.
capabilities.description_zh: 清算热力图中成群止损上/下方 —— 价格倾向先扫这些再反转。

detection.llm_prompt: Does heatmap show clustered liquidations above/below current price?

capabilities.name: Large Exchange Inflow
capabilities.description: Whales moving coins onto exchanges → bearish pressure.
capabilities.description_zh: 巨鲸把币转入交易所 → 抛压预期。

capabilities.name: LTH (Long-Term Holders) Not Selling
capabilities.description: LTH supply stable during downtrend = strong hands holding, bullish base.
capabilities.description_zh: 长期持币者供应稳定 = 强手持有，看多基础。

capabilities.name: BTC Halving Cycle Phase
capabilities.description: Classify months since halving (typical cycle: +0-6 accumulation, +6-12 parabolic, +12-18 distribution, +18-24 bear).
capabilities.description_zh: 依据减半后月份分段：0-6 累积，6-12 抛物，12-18 派发，18-24 熊。

capabilities.name: 4-Year Cycle Theory
capabilities.description: BTC tends to peak every 4 years, followed by ~12 month bear. Used as long-term framing.
capabilities.description_zh: BTC 每 4 年见顶，然后约 12 个月熊。

capabilities.name: FOMC Week Risk-Off
capabilities.description: Reduce positions before FOMC; volatility spikes typical.
capabilities.description_zh: FOMC 前降仓位，事件前后波动大。

capabilities.name: BTC ETF Net Flows as Demand Proxy
capabilities.description: Multi-day positive ETF inflows = institutional demand, supports uptrend.
capabilities.description_zh: 多日 ETF 净流入 = 机构需求支撑上涨。

capabilities.name: Don't Catch Falling Knives
capabilities.description: Never try to catch bottoms in clear waterfall; wait for confirmation of reversal.
capabilities.description_zh: 瀑布式下跌时不要抄底，等反转确认。

capabilities.name: Risk 1-2% Per Trade
capabilities.description: Position size such that loss at stop = 1-2% of portfolio.
capabilities.description_zh: 仓位控制使单笔亏损 = 1-2%。

capabilities.name: Cut Losses Early
capabilities.description: Always have a stop, honor it without second-guessing.
capabilities.description_zh: 总是设止损，严格执行不犹豫。

capabilities.name: Regime: Strong Uptrend
capabilities.description: Higher highs, higher lows, above all major MAs, MACD positive. Bias = trend-follow long only.
capabilities.description_zh: 抬高高点、抬高低点，在所有主要均线之上，MACD 正，偏多。

detection.rule_spec: price > ma200 and ma50 > ma200 and adx > 25

capabilities.name: Regime: Strong Downtrend
capabilities.description: Lower lows, lower highs, below all major MAs. Bias = short only or cash.
capabilities.description_zh: 创新低、压低高点，在所有主要均线之下。偏空或空仓。

detection.rule_spec: price < ma200 and ma50 < ma200 and adx > 25

capabilities.name: Regime: Ranging
capabilities.description: ADX < 20, price oscillates within bounds. Fade extremes, no breakouts.
capabilities.description_zh: ADX < 20，价格在区间内震荡。反手两端，不追突破。

capabilities.name: Regime: High Volatility
capabilities.description: Realized vol above 80th percentile — reduce size, wider stops, avoid tight setups.
capabilities.description_zh: 已实现波动率位于 80 分位以上 —— 减仓、拉宽止损、避开窄 setup。

capabilities.name: ICT Breaker Block Retest
capabilities.description: Previous support becomes resistance after break (or vice versa). ICT methodology — enter on retest of breaker with confirmation.
capabilities.description_zh: 前支撑破位后变成阻力（或反之）。ICT 方法 —— 破坏块回测带确认后入场。

detection.llm_prompt: Is there a clear breaker block being retested? Which direction?

capabilities.name: ICT Fair Value Gap (FVG)
capabilities.description: 3-candle imbalance where middle candle leaves a gap. Price often returns to fill the FVG before continuing.
capabilities.description_zh: 3 根 K 线中间留下缺口的不平衡区。价格倾向回填 FVG 再继续。

detection.llm_prompt: Visible fair value gap / imbalance? Direction and level?

capabilities.name: Three Drives Pattern
capabilities.description: Three successive symmetric pushes to new highs/lows with Fib extensions, typical reversal signal at completion.
capabilities.description_zh: 三次对称的推进到新高/新低，配合斐波扩展，完成时倾向反转。

detection.llm_prompt: Three drives pattern reaching completion? Direction?

capabilities.name: Quasimodo Reversal
capabilities.description: Failed H&S variant — price makes lower low after failed higher high, signals aggressive reversal.
capabilities.description_zh: 头肩的失败变体 —— 失败的新高后创新低，激进反转信号。

capabilities.name: Liquidity Grab / Stop Hunt
capabilities.name_zh: 流动性猎杀 / 扫止损
capabilities.description: Price briefly spikes through obvious stop levels (prior highs/lows) then immediately reverses, hunting liquidity before real move.
capabilities.description_zh: 价格短暂刺破明显止损位（前高/前低）后立刻反转，扫流动性后启动真实走势。

detection.llm_prompt: Visible liquidity sweep followed by reversal?

capabilities.name: Doji at Key Level
capabilities.description: Doji candlestick at S/R or trend termination = indecision, often precedes reversal if confirmed by next candle.
capabilities.description_zh: 支撑/阻力或趋势末端出现十字星 = 犹豫，下根 K 确认后常反转。

capabilities.name: Engulfing Candle Reversal
capabilities.description: Bullish/bearish engulfing candlestick at a swing — body fully engulfs prior candle, strong reversal signal.
capabilities.description_zh: 吞没形态（实体完全吞没前一根）在摆动位 = 强反转。

capabilities.name: Pin Bar Rejection
capabilities.description: Candle with long wick (>2x body) rejecting a key level — price was tested and refused.
capabilities.description_zh: 长上/下影线（>2x 实体）在关键位拒绝 —— 价格试探后被否。

capabilities.name: Double Needle Bottom
capabilities.description: Two successive long lower wicks at similar level within a few candles — strong accumulation signal at support.
capabilities.description_zh: 几根 K 内出现两根相近位置的长下影线 —— 支撑位强吸筹信号。

detection.llm_prompt: Double needle bottom (两根长下影线) visible?

capabilities.name: Fake Breakout Trap
capabilities.description: Price breaks a key level on low volume or sparse momentum, fails to hold, returns to range. Trap for breakout traders.
capabilities.description_zh: 价格在低成交量/弱动能下突破关键位但不能维持，回到区间内。突破党陷阱。

detection.llm_prompt: Is this a fake breakout that reversed?

capabilities.name: Triple Bottom Structure
capabilities.description: Three approximately equal lows with upward break — stronger reversal base than double bottom.
capabilities.description_zh: 三次相近低点后向上突破 —— 比双底更强的反转底部。

capabilities.name: Funding/Price Divergence
capabilities.description: Price making higher highs while funding rate trending down (cooling positioning) — divergence suggests healthier move.
capabilities.description_zh: 价格创新高但资金费下降（情绪降温）—— 背离说明行情更健康。

capabilities.name: Basis/Premium Blowout
capabilities.description: Futures basis/premium spikes >15% annualized, signals extreme bullish positioning likely to reverse.
capabilities.description_zh: 期货基差/溢价年化 >15% 表示极端看多仓位，常预示反转。

capabilities.name: Options Put/Call Skew Bullish
capabilities.name_zh: 期权 Put/Call Skew 偏多
capabilities.description: 25-delta put skew relative to call skew flattens/inverts — market pricing less downside fear, bullish.
capabilities.description_zh: 25-delta put skew 相对 call skew 变平或反转 —— 市场定价下行恐慌减弱，看多。

capabilities.name: Global M2 Growth Proxy
capabilities.description: Global M2 expansion → bullish for BTC with ~12 week lag. M2 contraction → headwind.
capabilities.description_zh: 全球 M2 扩张 → 利好 BTC（~12 周滞后）。M2 收缩 → 逆风。

capabilities.name: ISM PMI Business Cycle Phase
capabilities.name_zh: ISM PMI 经济周期阶段
capabilities.description: ISM PMI >50 = expansion (risk-on), <50 = contraction. Rising PMI from below 50 = strongest risk-on signal.
capabilities.description_zh: ISM PMI >50 为扩张（风险开），<50 为收缩。从 <50 回升 = 最强风险开。

capabilities.name: Credit Spreads Widening
capabilities.description: HY credit spreads widening = risk-off signal, precedes equity + crypto drawdowns.
capabilities.description_zh: 高收益债利差走阔 = 风险关闭信号，领先股市和加密回撤。

capabilities.name: BTC.D Shift (Alt Season Trigger)
capabilities.description: BTC dominance rolling over from top = capital rotating to alts = alt season begins.
capabilities.description_zh: BTC 市占率从高位下行 = 资金轮动到山寨 = 山寨季启动。

capabilities.name: Stablecoin Supply Growth
capabilities.description: Growing stablecoin market cap = dry powder on sidelines, bullish fuel for crypto.
capabilities.description_zh: 稳定币总供应增长 = 场外资金蓄势，加密看多燃料。

capabilities.name: NVT Ratio Valuation Extreme
capabilities.description: NVT (market cap / transaction volume) extreme high = overvalued short signal; extreme low = undervalued long signal.
capabilities.description_zh: NVT 极高 = 高估做空信号；极低 = 低估做多信号。

capabilities.name: MVRV Z-Score Cycle Signal
capabilities.description: MVRV Z-Score >7 historically marks cycle tops; <0 marks cycle bottoms.
capabilities.description_zh: MVRV Z 分数 >7 历史标记周期顶；<0 标记周期底。

capabilities.name: Key MA Reclaim
capabilities.description: Price reclaims 200DMA (or 50DMA) after a period below — trend change confirmation.
capabilities.description_zh: 价格从下方收复 200 日均线（或 50 日均线）—— 趋势切换确认。

capabilities.name: Parabolic Blow-off Exhaustion
capabilities.description: Exponential accelerating move with vertical slope = unsustainable, high probability of sharp reversal.
capabilities.description_zh: 指数级加速上涨至垂直斜率 = 不可持续，大概率急跌反转。
